description: Using the loaded Exam Anxiety dataset, perform an Analysis of Covariance (ANCOVA) to determine the effect of Gender on Exam performance while controlling for Anxiety. The analysis must include a homogeneity test (Levene's), estimated marginal means for Gender, and partial eta-squared as the effect size measure. Save the completed analysis to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ExamAnxiety_ANCOVA.omv.
